title: StakeStone - Open App
meta_description: stakestone routes you to the official app for Earn access across STONE, STONEUSD and STONEBTC. Verify domain before staking.
hero_h2: Open the official Earn route for crypto yield
hero_lead: StakeStone opens the official Earn route for ETH, BTC and stablecoin holders to review supported yield products, connect a wallet and continue in the app.
trust: Earn lists STONE, STONEUSD and STONEBTC
Docs list Quantstamp and SlowMist audits
what_is: StakeStone is a crypto-native neo-bank and yield infrastructure with an Earn module for STONE (ETH), STONEUSD and STONEBTC, according to the official Earn docs.

how.d: Open only app.stakestone.io and check the URL before connecting a wallet.
Use the official app flow to connect a supported wallet and view available Earn products.
Review the listed route for STONE, STONEUSD or STONEBTC without relying on third-party APY claims.
Check token, network, amount and wallet prompt details before signing any transaction.

points.p: The page sends users to the official app for wallet connection and Earn actions, keeping this page informational only.
Earn currently lists STONE (ETH), STONEUSD and STONEBTC, so users can identify the relevant asset path before continuing.
Audit and security records are maintained in the official security docs for review before interaction.

faq.a: stakestone is the searched brand name for StakeStone, a crypto-native neo-bank and yield infrastructure with an Earn module documented by the project.
No. This is a routing page; the official action URL is app.stakestone.io.

faq.q: Which assets does stakestone Earn mention?
faq.a: The official Earn docs list STONE (ETH), STONEUSD and STONEBTC as current Earn module services.
Yes. StakeStone docs include an Audits & Security section listing providers such as Quantstamp, SlowMist, Secure3 and Veridise.
Use the official app domain, app.stakestone.io, and verify it in your browser before connecting a wallet or signing transactions.

footer_note: This page is not the official app; verify app.stakestone.io before connecting a wallet, and treat all content as educational, not financial advice.
